lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Have we met before? You look really familiar to me.
I'm searching my mind, looking through my memory.

I don't think so, but I'm notoriously bad with faces.
Meeting people in all these different places.

Nice to meet you anyway.
How do you know the host today?

[Chorus]
Oh, we go way back, yeah, we went to college together.
Through the good times and the bad weather.

What about you? What's your story?
I just started working at his company.

No kidding! How are you liking the new gig?
Dreaming small or are you dreaming big?

[Verse 2]
It's been great, the team is super supportive.
A lot to learn, keeping it positive.

Well, let me introduce you to the old crew.
Yeah, it was really nice meeting you.

[Chorus]
Oh, we go way back, yeah, we went to college together.
Through the good times and the bad weather.

What about you? What's your story?
I just started working at his company.

No kidding! How are you liking the new gig?
Dreaming small or are you dreaming big?

[Bridge]
(Ooh) You look familiar...
(Yeah) Notoriously bad with faces...
(Ooh) We go way back...
(Yeah) How are you liking the new gig?

[Outro]
Well, let me introduce you.
Yeah, welcome to the crew.
Nice to meet you.

(Acoustic guitar fade out)

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 1]
Have we met before? You look really familiar to me.
lyricsJa.ja: 以前どこかでお会いしましたっけ？ すごく見覚えがあるんです。

lyricsJa.en: I'm searching my mind, looking through my memory.
lyricsJa.ja: 記憶をたどって思い出そうとしているんだけど。

lyricsJa.en: I don't think so, but I'm notoriously bad with faces.
lyricsJa.ja: 多分違うと思いますが、私、本当に人の顔を覚えるのが苦手で。

lyricsJa.en: Meeting people in all these different places.
lyricsJa.ja: いろんな場所でいろんな人に会うものですから。

lyricsJa.en: Nice to meet you anyway.
lyricsJa.ja: とにかく、初めまして。

lyricsJa.en: How do you know the host today?
lyricsJa.ja: 今日の主催者とはどういうお知り合いなんですか？

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Oh, we go way back, yeah, we went to college together.
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、もう長いつきあいですよ。実は大学が一緒だったんです。

lyricsJa.en: Through the good times and the bad weather.
lyricsJa.ja: 良い時も悪い時も、一緒にやってきました。

lyricsJa.en: What about you? What's your story?
lyricsJa.ja: そちらはどんな関わりですか？

lyricsJa.en: I just started working at his company.
lyricsJa.ja: 彼の会社で働き始めたばかりなんです。

lyricsJa.en: No kidding! How are you liking the new gig?
lyricsJa.ja: マジですか！新しい職場の居心地はどうですか？

lyricsJa.en: Dreaming small or are you dreaming big?
lyricsJa.ja: 地道にやってる？それとも大きく夢見てる？

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 2]
It's been great, the team is super supportive.
lyricsJa.ja: すごく良いですよ。チームがめちゃくちゃ協力的で。

lyricsJa.en: A lot to learn, keeping it positive.
lyricsJa.ja: 覚えることは山積みですが、前向きに頑張っています。

lyricsJa.en: Well, let me introduce you to the old crew.
lyricsJa.ja: それじゃあ、昔からの仲間たちに紹介しますよ。

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, it was really nice meeting you.
lyricsJa.ja: ええ、本当にお会いできてよかったです。

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
Oh, we go way back, yeah, we went to college together.
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、もう長いつきあいですよ。実は大学が一緒だったんです。

lyricsJa.en: Through the good times and the bad weather.
lyricsJa.ja: 良い時も悪い時も、一緒にやってきました。

lyricsJa.en: What about you? What's your story?
lyricsJa.ja: そちらはどんな関わりですか？

lyricsJa.en: I just started working at his company.
lyricsJa.ja: 彼の会社で働き始めたばかりなんです。

lyricsJa.en: No kidding! How are you liking the new gig?
lyricsJa.ja: マジですか！新しい職場の居心地はどうですか？

lyricsJa.en: Dreaming small or are you dreaming big?
lyricsJa.ja: 地道にやってる？それとも大きく夢見てる？

lyricsJa.en: [Bridge]
(Ooh) You look familiar...
lyricsJa.ja: (Ooh) 見覚えがあるんですが...

lyricsJa.en: (Yeah) Notoriously bad with faces...
lyricsJa.ja: (Yeah) 人の顔を覚えるのが苦手で...

lyricsJa.en: (Ooh) We go way back...
lyricsJa.ja: (Ooh) もう長いつきあいですよ...

lyricsJa.en: (Yeah) How are you liking the new gig?
lyricsJa.ja: (Yeah) 新しい職場はどうですか？

lyricsJa.en: [Outro]
Well, let me introduce you.
lyricsJa.ja: それじゃあ、紹介しますよ。

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, welcome to the crew.
lyricsJa.ja: ええ、歓迎します。

lyricsJa.en: Nice to meet you.
lyricsJa.ja: 初めまして。

lyricsJa.en: (Acoustic guitar fade out)
lyricsJa.ja: (アコースティックギター フェードアウト)

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: How do you know the host?
sentences.displayHtml: How do you know the host?

conversation.japanese: 初めまして。テイラーです。主催者（ホスト）とはどういうお知り合いなんですか？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: We actually went to college together.
sentences.displayHtml: We actually went to college together.

conversation.japanese: ああ、もう長いつきあいですよ。実は大学が一緒だったんです。そちらは？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I just started working at his company a few months ago.
sentences.displayHtml: I just started working at his company a few months ago.

conversation.japanese: 数ヶ月前に、彼の会社で働き始めたばかりなんです。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: How are you liking the new gig?
sentences.displayHtml: How are you liking the new gig?

conversation.japanese: マジですか！新しい仕事（職場）はどうですか？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: A lot to learn, but the team is super supportive.
sentences.displayHtml: A lot to learn, but the team is super supportive.

conversation.japanese: すごく良いですよ。覚えることは山積みですが、チームがめちゃくちゃ協力的で。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Well, let me introduce you to some of the old crew.
sentences.displayHtml: Well, let me introduce you to some of the old crew.

conversation.japanese: それは最高ですね。それじゃあ、昔からのオフレンドたちに紹介しますよ。
